source: Documentation compiler for accepted settings feedback.
summary: Documented Control Room header settings cog and opened TASK-069 for config option mapping UI.
knowledge_changes: Control Room product spec now includes a header settings cog and a Settings page for `.codewiki/config.json` option mappings while preserving five-section left rail.
Control Room system spec now defines Settings read-model categories, row fields, source truth, and read-only/API-gated boundaries.
roadmap_changes: TASK-069 created for implementing header settings cog and config mapping UI.
assumptions: Settings page can be read-only in the first slice.
Header cog/page does not violate the simplified five-section left rail.
